message:
🐛 Show real node names in All Nodes drill-down dialog (#1622)

The All Nodes dialog was fabricating names like "node-1", "node-2" from
cluster node counts. Now uses real node data from useCachedNodes() which
provides actual names (IP addresses, hostnames) fetched from clusters.
Falls back to cluster-based approximation only while data is loading.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
